methods.method_name: Statistical Analysis of Treatment and Sampling Effects
methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the effects of treatment and sampling week on pest populations and plant characteristics, primarily using ANOVA.

steps.description: Perform ANOVA to test for interaction effect between treatment and sampling week for eggplants (Table 1).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform two-way ANOVA for interaction effect
inputs: Eggplant life stage variable data (mites, whiteflies)
outputs: ANOVA results (F-statistic, df, p-value) for interaction effect

steps.description: Perform ANOVA to test for interaction effect between treatment and sampling week for pepper plants (Table 1).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform two-way ANOVA for interaction effect
inputs: Pepper plant life stage variable data (mites, whiteflies)
outputs: ANOVA results (F-statistic, df, p-value) for interaction effect

steps.description: If a strong significant interaction effect was found for pepper plants (Table 1), employ a further ANOVA test to separate out each sampling week for pepper.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform one-way ANOVA per sampling week
inputs: Pepper plant life stage variable data (mites, whiteflies)
outputs: ANOVA results (F-statistic, df, p-value) for treatment effect within each sampling week

steps.description: Analyze the effect of different treatments across the different sampling weeks for mobile mites (Table 2).
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze treatment effects over time
inputs: Mobile mite population data for pepper plants
outputs: Identification of significant treatment effects across sampling weeks

steps.description: Analyze treatment effects for the different whitefly life stages, noting significance towards the end of the sampling period (pepper).
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze treatment effects over time for whiteflies
inputs: Whitefly life stage data (eggs, juveniles, adults) for pepper plants
outputs: Identification of significant treatment effects for whitefly life stages across sampling weeks

steps.description: Perform ANOVA to test for significant treatment effect on the stem diameter difference for pepper plants.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform one-way ANOVA for treatment effect on stem diameter change
inputs: Stem diameter difference data for pepper plants
outputs: ANOVA results (F-statistic, df, p-value) for treatment effect on stem diameter difference

steps.description: Perform ANOVA to test for significant treatment effect on the stem diameter difference for eggplant plants.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform one-way ANOVA for treatment effect on stem diameter change
inputs: Stem diameter difference data for eggplant plants
outputs: ANOVA results (F-statistic, df, p-value) for treatment effect on stem diameter difference

steps.description: Perform ANOVA to test for a significant difference in the temperatures between the two different greenhouse rooms.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform one-way ANOVA for temperature difference
outputs: ANOVA results (F-statistic, df, p-value) for temperature difference

steps.description: Analyze treatment and host plant effects on population dynamics of Amblydromalus limonicus (predatory mites) and Trialeurodes vaporariorum (whiteflies).
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze treatment and host plant effects on population dynamics
inputs: Predatory mite population data (eggs, mobile mites)
outputs: Identification of differential treatment effects
Comparison of population performance between host plants
Statistical significance findings (implied)

methods.description: Measurement of plant stem diameter over a 10-week period to assess plant growth under different treatments and host plants.

steps.description: Measure stem diameter of plants over a 10 week period.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure plant stem diameter over time
outputs: Stem diameter measurements at multiple time points

steps.description: Calculate the largest diameter changes over the 10 week period.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate stem diameter change
outputs: Stem diameter difference/change over the period

methods.description: Monitoring and recording temperatures in the different greenhouse rooms where plants were grown.

steps.description: Measure and record temperature in the greenhouse room containing peppers.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure temperature in greenhouse room
outputs: Temperature readings over time

steps.description: Measure and record temperature in the greenhouse room containing eggplants.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure temperature in greenhouse room
outputs: Temperature readings over time

steps.description: Calculate the average temperature and range for each greenhouse room.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate average temperature and range
inputs: Temperature readings over time for each room
outputs: Average temperature
Temperature range

methods.description: Monitoring and counting populations of different life stages of predatory mites (Amblydromalus limonicus) and whiteflies (Trialeurodes vaporariorum) over the experimental period to assess population dynamics under different treatments and host plants.

steps.description: Note the discrepancy in the abundance of predatory mites and whiteflies between the two host plants.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare pest populations between host plants
